The representative of mother, the Moon, is in Virgo. She will be
beautiful and the Sun in the Moon's exaltation sign shows her faithfulness to
husband.
When he is 34 and 46, he will get into disputes on account of
money lending business. The conjunction of Mars, Rahu and the Sun
indicates trouble from leprosy-but he can be free from this disease by
propitiating God.
